title: Scientists map a large coral nursery in the Pacific
description: Marine scientists have mapped a large coral nursery in the Pacific Ocean. The team used underwater cameras to count young coral and study water conditions. The findings may help future conservation work.
text: Marine scientists have mapped a large coral nursery in the Pacific Ocean. The team used underwater cameras to count young coral and study water conditions. The findings may help future conservation work.
